descriptions.title: UI Resources (demo)
descriptions.subtitle: Buy seeds → plant → collect. Set VITE_MINIGAMES_API_URL for a live session.
descriptions.welcome: You start with coins and one crop plot. Open the shop, buy seeds, tap the plot to plant, wait for the timer, then collect your harvest. Icons use Sunflower Land testnet asset paths; swap `image` URLs in Items if needed.

SEED.name: Seeds
SEED.description: Buy here, then plant at the plot.

PLOT.name: Crop plot
PLOT.description: Your field slot — one active grow job per plot you own.
